Examples.Title: Get cache hit rate graph
Examples.Code:
### Get cache hit rate graph
GET {{host}}/analytics/graphs/cache/hit-rate?workspace_slug={{workspace_slug}}&time_of_generation_min={{time_of_generation_min}}&time_of_generation_max={{time_of_generation_max}}&total_units_min={{total_units_min}}&total_units_max={{total_units_max}}&cost_min={{cost_min}}&cost_max={{cost_max}}&prompt_token_min={{prompt_token_min}}&prompt_token_max={{prompt_token_max}}&completion_token_min={{completion_token_min}}&completion_token_max={{completion_token_max}}&status_code=401,403&weighted_feedback_min={{weighted_feedback_min}}&weighted_feedback_max={{weighted_feedback_max}}&virtual_keys=vk-slug-1,vk-slug-2&configs=pc-config-slug-1,pc-config-slug-2&api_key_ids=765768a9-b4ec-4694-962c-d55f40cdb0dc,7c22af5a-8119-46b8-8d9b-bad3ad382387&metadata={"_user":"user_1", "env": "staging"}&ai_org_model=openai__gpt-3.5-turbo,azure-openai__gpt-35-turbo&trace_id=my-unique-trace-1,my-unique-trace-2&span_id=my-unique-span-1,my-unique-span-2&prompt_slug=prompt-slug-1,prompt-slug-2
x-portkey-api-key: {{api_key}}

Examples.Title: Rotate API Key
Examples.Description:
Rotates an existing API key and returns a newly generated key value.
The previous key remains valid during the transition period and expires at `key_transition_expires_at`.
Examples.Code:
### Rotate API Key
POST {{host}}/api-keys/{{id}}/rotate
x-portkey-api-key: {{api_key}}
Content-Type: application/json
Accept: application/json

{
  "key_transition_period_ms": 3600000
}

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Remove an API Key
Examples.Code:
### Remove an API Key
DELETE {{host}}/api-keys/{{id}}
x-portkey-api-key: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: OK
# Content-Type: application/json

Examples.Title: Get Model Pricing
Examples.Description:
Returns pricing configuration for a specific model.

**Note:** Prices are in USD cents per token.

## Supported Providers

openai, anthropic, google, azure-openai, bedrock, mistral-ai, cohere, 
together-ai, groq, deepseek, fireworks-ai, perplexity-ai, anyscale, 
deepinfra, cerebras, x-ai, and 25+ more.

## Example Response Fields

| Field | Description | Unit |
|-------|-------------|------|
| `request_token.price` | Input token cost | cents/token |
| `response_token.price` | Output token cost | cents/token |
| `cache_write_input_token.price` | Cache write cost | cents/token |
| `cache_read_input_token.price` | Cache read cost | cents/token |
| `additional_units.*` | Provider-specific features | cents/unit |
Examples.Code:
### Get Model Pricing
# @name getModelPricing
GET {{host}}/model-configs/pricing/{{provider}}/{{model}}
x-portkey-api-key: {{api_key}}
Accept: application/json

## Responses
# 200
# Description: Pricing configuration for the specified model
# Content-Type: application/json
# 404
# Description: Model or provider not found
# Content-Type: application/json
